title: Deckers (DECK) to Report Q3 Earnings: Factors to Consider
text: Deckers' (DECK) third-quarter results are likely to reflect the impact of omni-channel expansion endeavors, customer-centric products and marketing strategies.

title: Deckers (DECK) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy?

title: Deckers' (DECK) Omni-Channel Efforts, Brand Strength Bode Well
text: Deckers' (DECK) substantial investments to strengthen its online presence are aiding its performance. Also, strength in the HOKA ONE ONE brand is a key driver.

title: 5 Sports Apparel Companies With High Profit Margins
text: Ahead of the final week of the National Football League's regular season, five sports apparel companies with high business quality and profit margins are Nike Inc. ( NKE , Financial), Deckers Outdoor Corp. ( DECK , Financial), Columbia Sportswear Co. ( COLM , Financial), Oxford Industries Inc. ( OXM , Financial) and Moncler SpA ( MIL:MONC , Financial) according to the All-in-One Screener, a Premium feature of GuruFocus.

title: HOKA® Reimagines The Run With The All-New Kawana
text: GOLETA, Calif., Jan. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  HOKA®, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), announces the launch of the all-new Kawana.
